title: Workflow — analyze load test results with SLO verdict and bottleneck identification
code_snippet:
# User provides k6 results + monitoring data:
# SLOs: p99 < 200ms, error < 0.1%, throughput > 5000 RPS
# Results: p50=12ms p95=45ms p99=285ms p99.9=1.8s, 5231 RPS, error=0.08%
# CPU: 78% sustained, Memory: growing 12%/5min, DB connections: 48/50 max
# Goroutines: 1200 (climbing)
expected_feedback: Workflow: Analyze mode + Standard depth. SLO Verdict: FAIL — p99=285ms exceeds 200ms target. Bottleneck: DB connection pool near saturation (48/50) correlates with p99 spike. Memory growth suggests possible leak (needs soak test). Goroutine climb indicates slow I/O blocking. Recommendations: (1) increase DB pool size, (2) run soak test for leak confirmation, (3) profile with pprof for goroutine analysis.
